tasks.title: Member Page Shell And Profile Controls
tasks.reviewer: Reviewer subagent, UI behavior and boundary check
scope: Remove visible text `這是會員頁面` without replacing it with another page title.
Implement the `/member` workspace shell, profile/account controls, desktop two-column layout, and mobile source order.
Preserve avatar input/ref/click wiring, display-name form wiring, public profile link, and exact `我的收藏` link.
nonScope: No edits to `src/app/member/page.jsx`, Bio editor, Dashboard tabs, Danger Zone, runtime, service, repo, rules, dependencies, or `/member/favorites`.
No in-page Nav, marketing hero, decorative scene, large page title, footer CTA, floating decorative card composition, or duplicated interactive slots.
dependencies: Satisfied: explicit user authorization for product-code implementation through Engineer/Reviewer subagents is recorded by the coordinator before T001 dispatch.
engineerInstructions: Add a CSS module import to `MemberPageScreen.jsx` and keep the component render-only.
Use one markup instance for profile controls, Bio slot, dashboard slot, and Danger Zone slot.
Gate public profile and favorites links on `user?.uid` and preserve destinations.
Modify only the owned files above.
acceptanceCriteria: AC-T001.1: `/member` no longer renders visible text `這是會員頁面`.
AC-T001.2: No Nav is added inside the page.
AC-T001.3: Desktop layout has profile/account controls, Bio, and Danger Zone left; dashboard tabs right.
AC-T001.4: Mobile order is profile/account controls, Bio, dashboard tabs, Danger Zone.
AC-T001.5: Avatar click, hidden file input, display-name form, public profile link, and exact `我的收藏` link preserve current wiring and visibility rules.
AC-T001.6: Utility-light visual style uses approved homepage cues without copying homepage hero/decorative/CTA patterns.
AC-T001.7: Long display names, emails, links, and button labels do not overlap adjacent controls.

evidence.reviewerReport: review_passed. Spec reviewer found no findings and accepted browser QA deferral to T004. Code quality reviewer found no findings and accepted browser QA deferral to T004.

tasks.title: Bio Editor And Danger Zone Styling Alignment
scope: Align Bio editor styling with member workspace tokens, 8px cards, thin borders, focus-visible states, and stable controls.
Align Danger Zone styling with the utility-light workspace while preserving destructive emphasis.
Improve modal fit and mobile button wrapping without behavior changes.
nonScope: No changes to Bio labels, count, save states, code-point counting, service calls, Danger Zone copy, modal actions, reauth, deletion API flow, or runtime state.
No edits to MemberPageScreen or dashboard files.
engineerInstructions: Consume inherited member CSS variables from T001 with fallback values.
Add or refine `:focus-visible` states for textarea and buttons.
Keep mobile button rows and modal content readable without overflow.
Modify only the owned files above.
acceptanceCriteria: AC-T002.1: Bio editor keeps all current labels, count, save states, success, and error behavior.
AC-T002.2: Bio editor visually matches the member workspace without card nesting or layout shift from status messages.
AC-T002.3: Danger Zone keeps current copy, modal semantics, actions, disabled states, and error display.
AC-T002.4: Danger Zone destructive styling is clear but restrained.
AC-T002.5: Mobile button rows and modal content wrap cleanly without overlapping text.

evidence.engineerReport: DONE. CSS-only changes to BioEditor.module.css and AccountDeletionDangerZone.module.css. Bio editor consumes `--member-*` token fallbacks, uses 8px radius, thin border, no shadow, textarea/button `:focus-visible`, stable footer/button min-height/mobile wrapping, and reserved success/error line to avoid layout shift. Danger Zone uses restrained destructive styling, 44px min-height buttons, wrapping, modal max-height/overflow-y, and mobile full-width buttons.
evidence.reviewerReport: review_passed. Spec reviewer confirmed the diff only touches owned CSS, JSX/runtime are untouched, copy/actions are unchanged, and browser evidence is deferred to T004. tasks.title: Dashboard Tabs And Responsive Panel Fit
tasks.reviewer: Reviewer subagent, ARIA and keyboard behavior check
scope: Refine dashboard tab and panel presentation for desktop right column and mobile single column.
Preserve tab labels, click selection, keyboard behavior, ARIA roles, inactive-panel handling, sentinel, and dashboard panel states.
Preserve card data, links, badges, metadata, and text content by leaving dashboard card components untouched.
nonScope: No edits to `DashboardTabs.jsx`, runtime hooks, member dashboard services, card components, card CSS, pagination logic, or fetch behavior.
No edits to MemberPageScreen, Bio, or Danger Zone files.
If card CSS is needed, stop and request a coordinator-approved owned-file update.
engineerInstructions: Prefer CSS changes; change JSX only for render-only wrappers or class names.
Keep existing `onClick`, `onKeyDown`, `tabIndex`, roles, IDs, and ARIA attributes intact.
Keep the sentinel div bound to `sentinelRef` mounted inside the active non-empty panel after rendered items.
Style loading, error, empty, load-more, retry, and end states consistently with member tokens.
Modify only the owned files above.
acceptanceCriteria: AC-T003.1: Dashboard tab labels and keyboard/click behavior remain equivalent.
AC-T003.2: ARIA roles and relationships remain intact.
AC-T003.3: Loading, first-load error with retry, empty, load-more loading, load-more error with retry, sentinel, and `已顯示全部` states remain rendered through the same runtime data.
AC-T003.4: Activity, post, and comment card data, links, badges, metadata, and text content remain untouched.
AC-T003.5: Dashboard fits desktop right column and mobile column without overlapping labels, buttons, or status text.

tasks.title: Integration Verification And Workflow Evidence
tasks.reviewer: Reviewer subagent, final integration gate check
scope: Run final automated gates and browser QA for the integrated `/member` redesign.
Record evidence in workflow state files after implementation tasks pass review.
Confirm no product behavior outside `/member`, `/member/favorites`, rules, schema, dependencies, runtime/service/repo logic, or deploy behavior changed.
nonScope: Do not edit product code by default.
Do not fix implementation findings inside T004 without a coordinator-approved owned-file update.
Do not push, open a PR, watch CI, merge, sync local `main`, or deploy rules.
readOnlyContext: Task-local diffs and exact Engineer/Reviewer evidence for T001, T002, and T003
engineerInstructions: Run each verification command separately and record exit code, expected signal, and actual signal.
Use in-app Browser or Playwright for `/member` desktop and mobile evidence.
Do not execute account deletion confirmation during QA.
If browser QA finds a product defect, record it and return to the coordinator for a targeted task update.
Update only workflow evidence fields in the owned files.
acceptanceCriteria: AC-T004.1: All automated gates pass or any failure is proven unrelated and explicitly carried as a blocker.
AC-T004.2: Browser evidence covers desktop and mobile `/member` layout and required interactions.
AC-T004.3: Tasks, status, and handoff agree on active task, active wave, task states, authorization boundary, rules deploy status, incidents, and latest verification.
AC-T004.4: No release summary claims deployed rules, deployed functions, or production product behavior.
AC-T004.5: No unreviewed product-code changes remain after integration verification.

Desktop screenshot showed account/profile controls, Bio, and Danger Zone left with dashboard tabs right; mobile order was account/profile controls -> Bio -> dashboard tabs -> Danger Zone; no overlap, legacy title, duplicate Nav, or duplicate interactive sections were found. Destructive deletion confirmation and persistent Bio/display-name mutations were intentionally not executed.
